title: randia fragrans
intro: Randia fragrans, also known as the fragrant randia or randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical forests in Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Randia fragrans include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Randia fragrans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
